productDisplayName: Facit Men Sportz Charcoal Innerwear Vest
description: CompositionCharcoal grey melange rib knit sleeveless vest made of 100% premium cotton, has a square neckline, wide arm holes, thin shoulder straps, no itchy label and distressed look graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry cleanableLightweight with a squared neck, this facit ribbed vest is crafted using pure cotton that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The narrow squared neck and wide armholes accentuate your shoulders and chest muscles. The vest comes with a printed brand label on the inner neck that provides abrasion-free comfort. The distressed look print on the front adds to rugged styling. Team this with tracks.Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
